label: BREAKING
hook: TRUMP: IRAN AGREED TO NO NUCLEAR WEAPON
stat1: Iran says uranium stays put, enrichment unlimited
stat2: No deal signed. No official Iranian confirmation.
stat3: Third Trump 'deal' Iran hasn't confirmed this month
tts_text: Breaking. President Trump says Iran has agreed not to pursue a nuclear weapon. Iran's Foreign Ministry hasn't confirmed any such agreement.
caption:
Trump just declared that Iran has agreed not to pursue a nuclear weapon. Iran's Foreign Ministry response: uranium won't be transferred anywhere, Iran won't accept enrichment limits, and no deal has been signed.

This is pattern recognition, not diplomacy. In April, Trump announced a ceasefire Iran kept violating. On May 4th, he said hostilities were terminated. Iran fired on the UAE the same day. Today he's declaring a nuclear concession Iran hasn't confirmed. The gap between Trump's announcement and Iran's actual statement isn't a communication delay. It's a negotiation tactic masquerading as fait accompli.

What matters here is what gets signed, not what gets said at a microphone. Until Iran formally abandons enrichment or accepts IAEA inspections, this is theater. Trump's pattern suggests he needs wins faster than diplomacy moves.

#breaking #iran #nuclear #trump #diplomacy
